violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be between 200-400 ppm. PIC added additional sanitizer and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat AND chlorine sanitizing solution for the sanitizers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Inspector observed a small amount of old rodent droppings in hard to reach areas in various corners behind equipment in the kitchen areas. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
